method:did:val
did:method:

did:methodval)
:did:method:val
did.method.val
did:method:val:
did:method:val%
did:method:val%BB
did:method:val%3A1234
did:web:localhost%3A1234

did:METHOD:val
did:m123:val
did:method:val/two
did:method:val?two
did:method:val#two
did:method:val%
did:method:
